name: Upholstered Adjustable Height Office Chair Cream - Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee
description:
Work in leisure by sitting on the Upholstered Adjustable-Height Office Chair from Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee. This cream-hue office chair features an upholstered design with fixed arms and an adjustable height for comfortable sitting. Made with a wooden frame, this upholstered office chair also features swivels for convenient movement.

Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee: Looks like home, feels like you.
